scripts.stand: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run stand:server" "npm run stand:web"
scripts.dev:release-ports: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @webcli/server" "npm run dev -w @webcli/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @webcli/web && npm run build -w @webcli/server
